title: M17 1JT, S. Norton & Co Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/XP3792CT/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: S. Norton & Co Limited Installation name: Tenax Road Permit number: EPR/XP3792CT/V005  "
